flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Old Dominion University rose 18% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.8k → $12.8k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 6 pp at Old Dominion University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (44.4% vs 50.8%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Old Dominion University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).
